description: Task relabel UI config. Normal workflow: choose chassis type and object, press Enter. Action prefix is optional and defaults to none. GPU allows one optional extra breakpoint for ambiguous cases.

cpu.label: cpu_subtask_1
cpu.prompt: move the gripper to the CPU

cpu.label: cpu_subtask_2
cpu.prompt: grasp the cpu and move it towards the insertion slot

cpu.label: cpu_subtask_3
cpu.prompt: place the cpu into insertion slot

disk.label: disk_subtask_2
disk.prompt: grasp the disk and insert it into the insertion slot

disk.label: disk_subtask_4
disk.prompt: insert the disk into the slot

gpu.label: gpu_subtask_2
gpu.prompt: grasp the gpu and move the gpu toward the slot

gpu.label: gpu_subtask_3
gpu.prompt: insert the gpu into the slot

gpu.label: gpu_subtask_4
gpu.prompt: press down on the gpu until it lock into place

ram.label: ram_subtask_2
ram.prompt: grasp the ram and move it above insertion slot

ram.label: ram_subtask_4
ram.prompt: press down the ram on one side

ram.label: ram_subtask_5
ram.prompt: press down the ram on the other side

canonical_rule: If action_prefix is none, canonical_label = object. Otherwise canonical_label = action_prefix + '_' + object.
